prTitle: fix(upstream): preserve discovered skill prompt fallback (closes #108)
prBody:
Ports upstream gsd-pi commit `8dd6272` ("fix: preserve discovered skill prompt fallback") to otto-cli. Closes #108.

## Root cause (essence-reimplement)
In `before_agent_start`, when the workflow result is `undefined` (no project `.otto/workflow` root, so `buildBeforeAgentStartResult` early-returns), the system-prompt chain fell back to the bare `event.systemPrompt`, **dropping the discovered-skill fallback** (`<newly_discovered_skills>` block). otto composes the discovered-skills block *inside* `buildBeforeAgentStartResult`, after its early return, so unlike upstream there was no local `systemPrompt` at the chain site carrying that fallback.

## Fix
- `bootstrap/register-hooks.ts`: materialize the discovered-skill fallback at the `before_agent_start` chain site, so `currentSystemPrompt` preserves the `<newly_discovered_skills>` block (same marker/XML as `system-context.ts`'s `newSkillsBlock`, via `formatSkillsXml(detectNewSkills())`) when `workflowResult` is undefined. Runner contract (`return undefined` when nothing changed; conditional `systemPrompt` guard) is preserved.
- `skill-discovery.ts`: lazy-resolve skill dirs (read `homedir()` per call) so discovery honors a live `HOME` — an in-scope enabler; the existing `newSkillsBlock` path is unaffected.
- `tests/workflow-mcp-auto-prep.test.ts`: regression test pinning the root cause — no project workflow root + a newly discovered skill, asserts the returned `systemPrompt` contains `<newly_discovered_skills>` and the skill name. Fails before the fix, passes after.

## Strategy
`fix-strategy:essence-reimplement` (otto diverges from upstream's shape).

## Gates (all green)
- Regression: fails before, passes after
- Build: pass
- Targeted suite: pass
- Full suite (`npm test` -> `npm run verify:pr`): pass
- Independent reviewer: approve
